AI-assisted Chrome extension

Remote Job Search Starter

Launch structured job searches, open matching application flows, and keep your resumes, profile details, remembered answers, and AI drafting tools ready in one place.

Detected site

Checking...

Search mode

Job boards

Search region

Auto

Auto upload

On

Status

Choose a search mode to begin.

Settings are stored locally in the extension.

Automation Setup

Choose where to search, how broadly to open roles, and how uploads should behave.

Candidate Profile

Used for blank application fields and for region matching when Search region is set to Auto.

Contact details

Links and experience

Work preferences

Resume Library

Each role type can use its own resume automatically during uploads and AI drafting.

Remembered Answers

Manual answers are stored and reused later on matching application questions.

Saved answer count

Keep this list clean if you change your preferred responses over time.

0

Ready when you are

Save updates anytime, then launch the selected search flow.

If a site asks you to verify that you are human, finish it manually and the extension will resume. The extension fills fields and uploads files, but it does not auto-submit applications.
